headline: **MLB Daily Roundup**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers, winning 9-2 behind a strong team effort. Ezequiel Duran led the Rangers with 1 home run and 2 RBIs, while Tim Hill pitched 1.2 scoreless innings for Texas. The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-5 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Bo Naylor leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Chicago Cubs dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing an 8-3 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their team's availability. San Diego Padres catcher Luis Campusano has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left toe fracture. Joe Musgrove has been transferred from the 15-day to the 60-day injured list. The Boston Red Sox placed Roman Anthony on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 5, 2026, due to a right wrist sprain. The Chicago Cubs placed Matthew Boyd on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 4, 2026, due to a left meniscus injury.

There have been several trades and roster movements in the past day. The Chicago Cubs acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade with the Athletics. The Minnesota Twins acquired right-handed pitcher Yoendrys Gómez from the Tampa Bay Rays for cash. The Chicago White Sox acquired right-handed pitcher Trevor Richards from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Rangers 9-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers, winning 9-2 behind a strong team effort. Ezequiel Duran led the Rangers with 1 home run and 2 RBIs, while Tim Hill pitched 1.2 scoreless innings for Texas.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Twins 7-5**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Taylor Rogers pitched 1.2 scoreless innings for the Twins, striking out 2 batters.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Royals 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-5 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Bo Naylor leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Cade Smith earned the save, while Slade Cecconi was credited with the win.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Reds 8-3**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing an 8-3 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff. Michael Conforto led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit game, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Campusano on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres catcher Luis Campusano has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left toe fracture.

top_news.title: **Ferguson Joins Cubs Roster**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade. The Athletics traded Ferguson to the Cubs.
